rules.name: GMS_Grant_Management_System_and_Data_Issues

Flow.description: Allows GRs to create multiple types of cases

formulas.name: fla_DescriptionHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( FIND("<", {!f_rd}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_rd}, FIND("<", {!f_rd})) > FIND("<", {!f_rd}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_rd},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_rd},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_rd},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_rd},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_rd},"

formulas.name: fla_SummaryHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( FIND("<", {!f_rs}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_rs}, FIND("<", {!f_rs})) > FIND("<", {!f_rs}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_rs},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_rs},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_rs},"

Flow.label: GMS - Create Case

recordLookups.name: Get_Complaint_About_DP_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: Get Complaint About DP Record Type

fields.name: SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText:
Your case has successfully been created on {!Get_Award.Name}


Due to the sensitivity of this case, you won’t see this in the table below, but you will receive an email with all the relevant details and a member of the team will soon be in touch with next steps.

screens.description: For technical support including login and access issues as well as permissions (such as accessing reports)
screens.name: Complaint_About_Delivery_Partner_Case
screens.label: Complaint About Delivery Partner Case

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Risks_and_Issues_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Complaint Case Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Please enter details of the complaint you are raising in relation to this award.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Help_or_Support_Summary
fields.helpText: Please provide a brief summary of the support being requested.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Delivery_Partner_Name
fields.helpText: Please add the name of the Delivery Partner

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Description
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the support being requested.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

screens.description: For technical support including login and access issues as well as permissions (such as accessing reports)
screens.name: Complaint_Case
screens.label: Complaint Case

fields.name: Risks_and_Issues_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Complaint Case Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Please enter details of the complaint you are raising in relation to this award.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Help_or_Support_Summary
fields.helpText: Please provide a brief summary of the support being requested.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Description
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the support being requested.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Confirmation_message
fields.fieldText:
{!Get_New_Case_Number.Record_Type_Name__c} Case Ref: {!Get_New_Case_Number.CaseNumber}


Your request for a {!Get_New_Case_Number.Record_Type_Name__c} case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: ComplaintsDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Your case has successfully been created on {!Get_Award.Name}


Due to the sensitivity of this case, you won’t see this in the table below, but you will receive an email with all the relevant details and a member of the team will soon be in touch with next steps.
